title: Minecraft: Collectors Edition
description: A pack to be played how you like. Complete the Completist Index, follow the quests or play your own way!
body:
__![](https://i.imgur.com/7zJmsK9.png)__
 
**Minecraft: Collectors Edition **is an explorational pack that focuses more on a light hearted gameplay.****

This pack can be played many ways.

+ Fill out the completist index by collecting every block/item
+ Play kitchen sink style


There are limited magic and tech mods, this was to focus more on the exploring and collecting idea. Although Create, Spectrum and Bewitchment can be found. 
There are about 130 mods to play with and many add hundreds of blocks to build with.  

There are no limits, only your imagination!

****The pack can be played single player or with friends, more the merrier!****

                                                     Find Images under the image tab!

![](https://i.imgur.com/zAyFK0x.png)

-   **Vast new biomes to explore from Regions Unexplored and Promenade**

-   **Incredible amount of new building blocks to try out from Blockus, Chipped and more!**

-   **New food and crops to make from Farmers Delight.**

-   **Mobs galore, friendly and foes to tame and slay.**

-   **Collections! Plenty to collect from Hats, Mobheads, Plushies and Hover Pets.**

-   ****Use the Completionist Index to collect every** **accessible** **item listed within! Perfect for those hoarders!****

-   ****Play around with Create, make new contraptions and use the various tools included to make building your structures** **easier****!****

****Whole lots more inside!****
